name: neuro-trend-reporter
description: GitHub Actions powered public JSON API and dashboard for neuro research, news, startup, and funding trends.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/lib/http.mjs && node --check src/lib/rss.mjs && node --check src/lib/scoring.mjs && node --check src/collectors/papers.mjs && node --check src/collectors/news.mjs && node --check src/collectors/startups.mjs && node --check src/collectors/funding.mjs && node --check public/assets/app.js
